name: kismet
title: kismet
description:
wireless network and device detector (metapackage)
Kismet is a wireless network and device detector, sniffer, wardriving tool,
and WIDS (wireless intrusion detection) framework.
.
Kismet works with Wi-Fi interfaces, Bluetooth interfaces, some SDR (software
defined radio) hardware like the RTLSDR, and other specialized capture
hardware.
.
This is a metapackage containing the kismet tools.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kismet because wireless network and device detector (metapackage).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use kismet as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kismet with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kismet --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
